condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段时间短且淘汰赛风险偏好下降，仍平是基础高概率分支。
points.rationale_en: Because extra time is short and knockout risk appetite falls, remaining level is the high-probability baseline branch.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: England凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: England wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: DR Congo凭借体能、替补或反击效率在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: DR Congo wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or counterattacking efficiency.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: England在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
points.rationale_en: England pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时一球分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.rationale_en: A supplementary coverage path for a one-goal extra-time decider.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: England加时领先后仍被对手回应，但最终净胜。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: England takes the lead in extra time, concedes a response, but still wins the segment.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 双方加时互有进球但仍未分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A supplementary extra-time path where both teams score but the match remains level.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: England凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time result is produced through a counterattack, set piece or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: England wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both teams score in extra time as the match shifts from caution into open exchanges.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: England在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: A team wins extra time by at least two goals, or the extra-time segment reaches three or more total goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: England pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

key_factors.impact_cn: 若90分钟未分胜负，双方都会开始管理点球路径，加时更可能从谨慎和定位球入手。
key_factors.label_en: If level after 90 minutes, penalty-path management becomes central
key_factors.impact_en: If the match is not decided in 90 minutes, both sides begin managing the penalty path, so extra time is more likely to start cautiously and through set pieces.
key_factors.text_cn: 若90分钟未分胜负，双方都会开始管理点球路径，加时更可能从谨慎和定位球入手。
key_factors.text_en: If the match is not decided in 90 minutes, both sides begin managing the penalty path, so extra time is more likely to start cautiously and through set pieces.

key_factors.label_cn: 英格兰控球与定位球主动权
key_factors.impact_cn: 英格兰仍有控球、定位球和二点球主动权，但长时间阵地进攻会降低连续反抢质量。
key_factors.label_en: England keeps possession and set-piece initiative
key_factors.impact_en: England still has possession, set-piece and second-ball initiative, but prolonged positional attack can reduce counter-pressing quality.
key_factors.text_cn: 英格兰仍有控球、定位球和二点球主动权，但长时间阵地进攻会降低连续反抢质量。
key_factors.text_en: England still has possession, set-piece and second-ball initiative, but prolonged positional attack can reduce counter-pressing quality.

key_factors.label_cn: 右后卫伤缺与身后风险
key_factors.impact_cn: Reece James、Jarell Quansah缺阵使英格兰右路替代方案和身后保护成为加时风险点。
key_factors.label_en: Right-back injuries keep England's recovery lane under watch
key_factors.impact_en: With Reece James and Jarell Quansah out, England's right-back workaround and space behind that flank remain extra-time risk points.
key_factors.text_cn: Reece James、Jarell Quansah缺阵使英格兰右路替代方案和身后保护成为加时风险点。
key_factors.text_en: With Reece James and Jarell Quansah out, England's right-back workaround and space behind that flank remain extra-time risk points.

key_factors.impact_cn: DR Congo更可能低位等待英格兰体能和反抢质量下降后，通过Wissa、Mayele或死球寻找一次性机会。
key_factors.label_en: Wissa and Mayele keep a late transition window alive
key_factors.impact_en: DR Congo is more likely to sit low and wait for England's fitness or counter-pressing to drop, using Wissa, Mayele or dead balls for one decisive chance.
key_factors.text_cn: DR Congo更可能低位等待英格兰体能和反抢质量下降后，通过Wissa、Mayele或死球寻找一次性机会。
key_factors.text_en: DR Congo is more likely to sit low and wait for England's fitness or counter-pressing to drop, using Wissa, Mayele or dead balls for one decisive chance.

key_factors.label_cn: 105分钟后冒险受点球准备牵制
key_factors.impact_cn: 105分钟仍平时，英格兰未必全员压上，定位球、二点球和有限人数压迫更符合其点球准备优势。
key_factors.label_en: Risk-taking after 105 minutes is constrained by penalty preparation
key_factors.impact_en: If still level after 105 minutes, England is unlikely to overcommit completely; set pieces, second balls and controlled pressure better fit its penalty-preparation edge.
key_factors.text_cn: 105分钟仍平时，英格兰未必全员压上，定位球、二点球和有限人数压迫更符合其点球准备优势。
key_factors.text_en: If still level after 105 minutes, England is unlikely to overcommit completely; set pieces, second balls and controlled pressure better fit its penalty-preparation edge.

condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
